action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Voucher$ImportPurchase$Item @unitCode, @ma_vt return end
select he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*') return
declare @c varchar(32) select @c = ma_kho from dmdc where ma_dc = @ma_dc if dbo.FastBusiness$Function$CheckSiteRights('PR1', '', @c, @@userID, @@admin) = 0 select '' as c else select @c as c return

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt left join dmttct2 c on a.xstatus = c.xstatus and a.ma_ct = c.ma_ct where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause
